settings.title: Shipping & Return Policy
settings.subtitle: Fast delivery, 30-day risk-free satisfaction guarantee for all natural skincare products.

settings.title: Fast Processing
settings.description: Orders dispatched within 1–2 business days. Tracked shipping delivered to your doorstep.

settings.title: 30-Day Guarantee
settings.description: Not in love with your tallow balm? Return it within 30 days for a 100% full product refund.

settings.title: Free US Shipping
settings.description: Enjoy free standard shipping on all US domestic orders over $50.

settings.heading: Shipping Information
settings.content:
At Sankofa Tallow, every batch of our grass-fed tallow balm is carefully handcrafted and packaged to maintain peak freshness and potency.

  • Processing Time: Orders are processed and packed within 1 to 2 business days (excluding weekends and holidays).
  • Standard Domestic Shipping (US): 3 to 5 business days post-processing. Free on orders $50+.
  • International Shipping: 7 to 14 business days depending on destination country and customs clearing.

You will receive a shipping confirmation email containing your tracking number as soon as your package leaves our facility.

settings.heading: 30-Day Satisfaction & Return Policy
settings.content:
We want you to experience the transformative power of 100% grass-fed tallow skincare risk-free. If for any reason you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you may return it within 30 days of delivery for a full refund of the product purchase price.

Return Guidelines:

  • Items must be returned within 30 days from the delivery date.
  • Original packaging or proof of purchase is required.
  • Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer unless the product arrived damaged or defective.

settings.heading: Damaged or Incorrect Orders
settings.content: In the rare event that your jar arrives damaged or you receive an incorrect item, please email us immediately at Sankofatallow@gmail.com within 48 hours of delivery with your order number and a photo of the damaged item. We will ship a replacement to you free of charge right away.

settings.heading: How to Initiate a Return
settings.content: To start a return or exchange, simply contact our support team at Sankofatallow@gmail.com with your order number and reason for return. Our team will guide you through the return address and processing steps.
